title: reseda alba var. trigyna
intro: Reseda alba var. trigyna is a plant species known as White Mignonette, which belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Reseda alba var. trigyna include its potential to treat conditions such as edema, gout, and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
